metadata.description: The Nx Devkit is used to customize Nx for different technologies and use cases. It contains many utility functions for reading and writing files, updating configuration, working with Abstract Syntax Trees(ASTs), and more. Learn more about [extending Nx by leveraging the Nx Devkit](https://nx.dev/extending-nx/intro/getting-started) on our docs.

commands.command: nx run nx-dev:build-base:netlify && cp nx-dev/nx-dev/_redirects nx-dev/nx-dev/.next/_redirects && nx run nx-dev:sitemap

node -e "let i = 0; let interval = setInterval(() => { console.log('Long task running ' + i++ + '---------------------------------------------------------------'); }, 200); setTimeout(() => { clearInterval(interval); console.log('Long task finished'); }, 62_000);"

format.//: nx format doesn't respect overrides, so we manually run prettier for mdoc files

data.name: astro-docs
data.comment: package.json#scripts runs in the project root directory with astro assumes is where the node_modules is. which fails. so run the scripts in project.json#targets with --root command instead
